acceptance_targets: [chapter_09_f01] Pass if the revised span at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:259-266 contains at least one outbound Eli reply that directly answers either 'Where exactly are you?' or 'What pass?', plus one inbound response that changes his next action; fail if he still exits the scene without answering either message.

[chapter_09_f02] Pass if every retained interaction in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:159-233 ends with an observable decision by Eli that alters what he can do next, and no two consecutive interactions are information-only handoffs; fail otherwise.

[chapter_09_f03] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:163-173 includes at least one fully rendered physical action-response sequence (attempt -> pain/limitation -> adjustment) tied to the rib injury; fail if treatment remains summarized in a single omnibus sentence.

[FBR-002] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2719 no longer claims a contradictory self-performed front-pad change and the crash causality reads from one consistent prior repair state. Fail if the chapter still asserts a separate overnight front-pad replacement not supported by Chapter 8.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised span at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:259-266 contains at least one outbound Eli reply that directly answers either 'Where exactly are you?' or 'What pass?', plus one inbound response that changes his next action; fail if he still exits the scene without answering either message.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the family-contact climax: the chapter stages the difficult messages, then retreats before any live consequence lands. Eli sends a pulse-check text, receives high-pressure replies, and the prose cuts to logistics instead of rendering the confrontation the scene has earned.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:259-266, replace the cutaway with an on-page exchange that forces one uncomfortable truth. Keep the chapter endpoint in transit if needed, but insert a brief Nora or June response loop where Eli answers directly (location, injury status, immediate plan) and absorbs a concrete boundary or demand before moving to the shuttle timetable beat.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if every retained interaction in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:159-233 ends with an observable decision by Eli that alters what he can do next, and no two consecutive interactions are information-only handoffs; fail otherwise.
findings.problem: Post-crash architecture drifts into a serial intake procession (triage -> registrar -> social worker -> discharge desk) with similar scene function, so leverage shifts flatten. Consequences are itemized, but dramatic pressure stalls between beats.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:159-233, compress at least one institutional interaction and reallocate lines to Eli making explicit choices under pressure (payment-plan posture, transport commitment, retrieval priority). Ensure each retained exchange ends by narrowing or widening his options, not just adding information.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:163-173 includes at least one fully rendered physical action-response sequence (attempt -> pain/limitation -> adjustment) tied to the rib injury; fail if treatment remains summarized in a single omnibus sentence.
findings.problem: Timidity in injury aftermath: a high-stakes physical window is summarized ('X-rayed, scanned, glued') right before administrative beats, which softens embodied vulnerability at the moment the cracked-rib reality should be most immediate.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:163-173, replace summary compression with one rendered care action (e.g., breathing tool attempt, assisted repositioning, cough/pain spike) that shows physical cost in real time before the discharge instructions and billing logistics proceed.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2719 no longer claims a contradictory self-performed front-pad change and the crash causality reads from one consistent prior repair state. Fail if the chapter still asserts a separate overnight front-pad replacement not supported by Chapter 8.
findings.problem: Chapter 9 introduces an off-page brake event (Eli changing front pads himself) that conflicts with Chapter 8's stated repair sequence, creating a factual continuity contradiction in a causally central setup for the whiteout crash.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2719 (and any dependent references in snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2779 to snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2784) so pre-crash brake condition matches the established Chapter 8 history instead of introducing a new off-page repair.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
